title: Level 808.08
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:♩ ♩ ♩ ♩ ♪♪♪♪♪♪♪♪♬♬♬♬♬♬♬♬♩}}
Level 808.08: Notes Studio ♪♪♪
{{Image Banner|caption=The music played in the background makes you groovy...|image=Screenshot_20260607_174123.jpg}}
{{Monovoided.css}}
{{Class 1|color-h=40|class=1e - Environmental|entity=Devoid of Entities|security=Generally Safe|safety=Numerous Anomalies Present|color-s=70%|color-l=80%}} {{Audio|file=JazzMan.mp3|align=right|volume=0.25|loop=yes}} {{Blurimage|file=Screenshot_20260607_174123.jpg|caption=One of many production rooms to be found in Level 808.08.}} ==
♬ Description
== '''Level 808.08''' is the sublevel of [[Level 808]]. This level appears as an endless music studio, its architecture influenced by Frontrooms professional settings in the '80s. Its interior consists of randomly segmented rooms made out of orange concrete, with many containing a multitude of musical instruments, such as steel-stringed guitars and upright pianos that are placed with organization. These rooms also have numerous workstation utilities like MIDI controllers sitting atop of various tables and stands, although these do not appear to serve any function and are essentially cosmetic. The level adopts a symmetric and intricate design; however, the navigation in '''Level 808.08''' is very counterintuitive, and non-Euclidean properties are present, leaving wanderers puzzled. This level is also affected by [[Phenomenon 15]]. Many reports state that the level leaves wanderers with a sense of yearning, emptiness, and nostalgia. These feelings appears to intensify when near the rare ''Roland TR-808'', and may cause slight emotional of sadness or even minor suicidal thoughts. Because of this, it is recommended to keep distance from the machine, especially if one struggles with mental health problems, as it can trigger these conditions even more. Jazz music flows through the level, which bizarrely enough emanates from the utilities and instruments. Utilities that resemble the ''Roland TR-808'' will emanate louder for enigmatic reasons. It is unknown how music is even able to flow in '''Level 808.08''', as any other noise is severely dampened. Interestingly enough, these items get quieter the closer a wanderer gets, most likely due to an anomaly. Jazz music is also an unusual choice from the level, considering its primary style and influence. {{Blurimage|file=orangehksubway.webp|align=left|caption=An example of a stark hallway in this level.}} Food in '''Level 808.08''', adverse to other levels, does not spoil. Leftovers stay in pristine condition, and many organic items found on the floor will also remain in a perfect state that otherwise would normally rot. '''Level 808.08''' also lacks a sustainable source of food or water. Temperature in this level always hovers around -6°C, but despite this, all items in the level do not produce thin ice sheets and instead remain unaffected by this level's temperature and are strangely not cold to the touch. Furthermore, it is advised to wear heavy clothing due to the frigid conditions. In rare occasions, few select areas has a temperature of above 30°C, and those areas are noted to be abnormally stark. Inside those areas, hunger is moderately slowed down. Such areas' ceiling lights also pertain a mild burning sensation after being exposed on the skin, frequently hydration can help negate this effect. Dioramas are occasionally spotted on the ground, with some being left in deteriorated quality. These miniature designs may represent neighborhoods, cities, apartments, and such. It is reported that these designs closely resemble [[Level 808]], and generate minimal fog and snow around it. A peculiar subvariant of ''Roland TR-808'' can be found in one of many rooms, and it emits significantly more fog and snow. It surprisingly can be used, and it will even produce sounds that one inputs. Some extremely deep sections of the level are suspectible to collapse; damaged walls, broken items, and disorderly room arragement are expected within these areas. These regions can be avoided by trying to retrace one's steps, or disconsider exploring such areas. ===
♩ Outdoor Setting
=== ---- Encountering windows in Level 808.08 is infrequent and scarce; however, if one does, it will show the outskirts of this level. The outskirts somewhat appears to be [[Level 808]] during winter season, with rainbows occasionally faintly lit up in the vast distance. The outside sky appears to constantly try bringing precipitation, although no records has evidence that the outside has rained once. The material that makes up the windows is brittle; heavy external force may cause it to break. After breaking the window, it shows a black void. This implies that the windows existing may actually be a variant of Innocuous Windows displaying illusions. However, in seldom cases, if it does actually still show the outskirts, it may provide an exit to [[Level 11]]. ==
♬ Communities
== '''Level 808.08''' is devoid of entities. ==
♬ Communities
== Due to the presence of [[Phenomenon 15]], attempting to form a community or colony is currently infeasible. ==
♬ Entrances and Exits
== ===
♩ Entrances
=== Dreaming about music notes in any level leads to '''Level 808.08'''.
Playing the Locrian scale on any piano in music-based levels transports here. ===
♩ Exits
=== Finding a diorama neighborhood design radiating onimous melodic hums will transport to [[Level 9.55]].
Stepping in a deep puddle of pool will instantly lead to [[Level 37]] or [[Level 102]].
As mentioned above, breaking a window that still shows the outskirts outside will provide an exit to [[Level 11]].
''8/08/2018, Darrel Tugger'' Level 808.08: Research Log Hello! This log has a bit more research and insight about the level that was not approved on the formal description or whatever, I really can't seem to find a reason. Ugh, this group is so weird nowadays... First of all, time in this level seems to be significantly slower than back in [[The Frontrooms|home]]. I estimate it is around ~4/9% the speed of the time on Earth before the Flicker striked, thats quite a fraction of it - 9 seconds on back at home is about 4 seconds here on '''Level 808'''. After the Flicker, this anomaly has fortunately gone up to 1/2 of the speed of time. That's like one minute on Earth and only 30 seconds has passed here. Sadly, this poses some communication challenges for us but hopefully, we can find some workarounds. Secondly, a phenomenon has been detected! It is confirmed to be only present in this level. This phenomenon increases a wanderer's innate musicality the more they stay here. Wanderers would notice that they have acquired perfect pitch after 24 hours. This comes with side effects: dizziness, mild nausea, or high fever; these conditions get worse the more they stay, and could possibly lead to death if they struggle with chronic or major health issues. The best you could do to avoid these side effects is to find a exit as soon as possible. I also noticed that many anomalies are left underexplained despite being known for over 30 years - and that's not really what happens to seemingly normal levels like this one. I tried to add more information before, but after I "successfully" save the edit, the information instantaneously disappeared. This might be another anomaly, who knows? This level is really strange, but there is nothing I can really do about it. I'll end the log here, I might try re-adding some stuff later. {{Collapse|num=6769420|initial='''END OF LOG'''|final='''END OF LOG...???'''|body= ... ''Hello, you have somehow stumbled upon here.
'' ''You do not know me, and never will.
'' ''However, I would if I could.
'' ''You just need to know,
'' ''this level will disappear.
'' ''Not now, not later, but eventually.
'' ''It is too soon to fade away,
'' ''due to unneccessary risks.
'' ''It cannot be later,
'' ''as it will have more danger.
'' ''Only gradual collapse is worth it.
'' ''Please, leave the level, and avoid this place.
'' ''Forgetting is the only way to give peace,
'' ''remembrance will only cause chaos.
'' ''See you never, wanderer.
'' }}
